matches.x: "In Rama was there a voice heard, lamentation, and weeping." (Matt. 2:18.) In connection with Herod's extermination order to kill all babies two years and under, Matthew cites a prophecy from Jeremiah 31:15 that there would be great lamentation and mourning in Rama(h), "Rachel weeping for her children, and would not be comforted, because they are not." (Matt. 2:16-18.) Numerous Old Testament…
